title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: 3Blue1Brown explores how logarithmic transformations of complex numbers can reveal hidden mathematical structure in M.C. Escher's Print Gallery. The video connects conformal maps, complex analysis, and artistic composition through interactive visualization and animation.
